case_title: RENT A CENTER VS WEST, MARGIE H.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WEST, MARGIE H.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RENT A CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEST, MARGIE H. $1,599.24 PRINCIPAL, $131.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,730.24, NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RENT A CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEST, MARGIE H. $1,730.24 PRINCIPAL, $1,707.51 INTEREST, $345.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,782.75, (COSTS = $315.00 <AFTER JUDGEMENT + $30.00 RENEWAL FEE>)
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-10-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-07-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR FURTHER EVIDENCE.
